$comment: The ONLY per-project edit surface for the loop-kit. Adapted for CropConnect: Node/Express + Mongoose backend in Backend/, React 19 + Vite frontend in Frontend/. Solo personal project.
$comment_envPrefix: Prefix for every bypass/override env var. LOOP_GATE, LOOP_BYPASS, LOOP_OFFLIMITS, LOOP_ALLOW_PROTECTED, LOOP_AUTOPASS.
$comment_profile: personal = no human checkpoints, verify-green is the pass, PR optional (commit to a feature branch, merge yourself). Switch to 'org' or set humanCheckpoints:["ship"] to require typing approve-ship before every commit.
$comment_humanCheckpoints: Empty = fully autonomous within the loop: plan auto-approves, commit gate needs marker + review but no human chat approval. Set ["ship"] to regain the approve-ship checkpoint.
$comment_packageManager: Both workspaces use package-lock.json. Backend and Frontend are separate npm projects — commands use `npm --prefix <dir>`.
$comment_sourceRoots: Dirs the EDIT GATE guards. An edit to a source file under these needs an approved plan-lock.
$comment_sourceExts: JS-only repo (no TS). Docs/config (.md/.json/.env.example) under sourceRoots edit freely.
$comment_testGlobs: Regexes (repo-relative path) identifying test files. EDIT GATE lets tests through without a plan-lock; REVIEW GATE requires at least one match in the diff (or --allow-no-tests for docs/config-only diffs).
$comment_protectedPaths: Auth middleware is human-owned — every protected route depends on it. Bypass per-edit with LOOP_OFFLIMITS=ack.
$comment_protectedBranches: No source edits while checked out on these — branch off first (feat/, fix/, chore/ ...).
$comment_verify: SHIP exit-condition commands. The kit only knows 'python' and 'frontend' stack keys — this repo is all-Node, so every command (backend included) lives under 'frontend'. Frontend lint is deliberately absent: 23 pre-existing eslint errors as of 2026-07-04 — CURRENT-FOCUS.md Task 1 fixes them and adds `npm --prefix Frontend run lint`, `npm --prefix Backend run lint`, and both test commands here.
$comment_verifyDirtyPaths: Paths VERIFY-STOP checks for uncommitted changes when a false-done is suspected.
$comment_integrations: MongoDB via Mongoose — no SQL migrations. No docker/husky/codeowners in this repo; flip to "auto" if any get added.
$comment_conventions: apiContract = the standard envelope {status, status_code, message, timestamp, data, error} from rules/api-standards.md — the existing routes predate it; new/touched endpoints adopt it. uiStates = loading+error+empty on every component. banThen = async/await only. maxComponentLines = split threshold.
